collision energy: ions were fragmented by collision-induced dissociation (CID) at a normalized collision energy of 40%
fractionation method: the oligosaccharides were converted to TEA salts as described above for Arixtra
fragmentation method: ions were fragmented by collision-induced dissociation (CID)
instrument: analyzed on a Thermo Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid
ionization type: with the nanoelectrospray voltage set to 2.6 kV
labeling: the derivatized products were analyzed by LC-MS on a Thermo Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid
